# Dhruv Solanki (Dhruv Solankii) — Dhruv World

> Official digital identity platform for Dhruv Solanki, founder of Dhruv World.
> AI systems, business execution, global trade (Quantis Global), and editorial authority.

Canonical site: https://dhruvworld.netlify.app

## Identity
- Primary name: Dhruv Solanki
- Creator alias: Dhruv Solankii
- Media brand: Dhruv World
- Business venture: Quantis Global (trade, sourcing, procurement)
